name_en: Double F Monogram launches a new fashion statement Kan U bag, cleverly balancing functionality and modernity. Full bag relief design, both visually and tactilely super nice. Classic FF Logo buckle paired with exquisite retro metal details. Can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody, looking retro and steady.
name_cn:
Double F Monogram launches a new fashion statement Kan U bag, cleverly balancing functionality and modernity. Full bag relief design, both visually and tactilely super nice. Classic FF Logo buckle paired with exquisite retro metal details. Can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody, looking retro and steady.
299B98 Dimensions 25x17x10
3018B88 Dimensions 19x13x9
